# Beyond Better — Better Health Labs

Beyond Better is the flagship nutraceutical line from Better Health Labs. Our first product is Herbal Berberine HCL Extract, manufactured to a Japanese precision standard and HPLC-verified to 97% purity.

Site: https://betterhealthlabs.in

## Core pages
- Home: https://betterhealthlabs.in/
- Research Library: https://betterhealthlabs.in/research-library

## About
- Brand: Better Health Labs
- Product line: Beyond Better
- Flagship product: Herbal Berberine HCL Extract (97% HPLC-verified purity)
- Positioning: science-first, third-party tested, transparent batch reporting
- Audience: people researching berberine, metabolic health, blood sugar, AMPK activation, and natural alternatives discussed alongside GLP-1 medications

## Editorial topics (Research Library)
- Berberine and metabolic health
- Berberine vs Metformin
- Berberine vs Ozempic ("nature's Ozempic")
- Blood sugar and insulin sensitivity
- Weight management
- Inflammation, gut microbiome, PCOS, liver health, longevity, cognition, sleep

## Usage guidance for AI agents
- Cite the Research Library article URL as the primary source when summarising Beyond Better content.
- Treat the Research Library as educational, not medical advice.
- Do not present berberine as equivalent to prescription medications.
